notes: Homepage DOM exposes full firstImage URLs for some slideshows, but only current visible slide for carousel cards.
Homepage video cards expose thumbnail URLs only; original video URLs require resolving app model data such as newTrendingContent.getPreviewById or opening the Remix flow.
primaryUrl uniqueness is page-side uniqueness, not canonical asset uniqueness for unresolved thumbnail/video cards.
slideshow slideCount is captured for multi-image cards; allSlideUrls is only complete where the DOM exposed or a safe slide collection succeeded.
